zh.lifeSummary: 當William Felt於1575年出生在英國貝德福爾時，他的父親Thomas Felt15歲，母親Jane Stotwell18歲。他於1601年與Mary Smith在英國英格蘭貝德福爾麗頓 布札爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1657年10月8日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾希斯 安德 雷亞其享年82歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾希斯 安德 雷亞其。

nameMeanings.name: Felt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for someone who made, worked with, sold, or perhaps wore felt, from Middle English felt ‘felt’. Compare Felter .
German: rare variant of Feld ‘field, area of open country’, or an Americanized form of its cognate Velt.
Swedish: rare variant of   Feldt  , a cognate of 2 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Felter
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Felten or Velten.
Americanized form of German Felder or a shortened and altered form of any of various surnames formed with -felder, as for example Kleinfelder (compare Kleinfelter ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Felt was born in 1575, in Bedfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Felt, was 15 and his mother, Jane Stotwell, was 18. He married Mary Smith in 1601, in Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 8 October 1657, in Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Felt est né en 1575, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Felt, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Jane Stotwell, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mary Smith en 1601, à Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 8 octobre 1657, à Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: William Feltが1575年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Feltは15歳，母Jane Stotwellは18歳であった。1601年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアレイトン ブッザルドでMary Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1657年10月8日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヒース アンド レアチで82歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアヒース アンド レアチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Felt(이)가 1575년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Felt(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Stotwell(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1601년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 레이턴 버자르드에서 Mary Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1657년 10월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 히스 앤드 리치에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 히스 앤드 리치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Felt nasceu em 1575, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Felt, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Jane Stotwell, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Smith em 1601, em Leighton Buzzard, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 8 de outubro de 1657, em Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Felt родился в 1575 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Felt было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Stotwell, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Smith в 1601 г. в местности лиитон буззард, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 8 октября 1657 г. в местности хит анд рич, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности хит анд рич, бедфордшир, Англия.
